title: Technoblade Never Dies!!
description: Created for people that want Technoblade in their game.
body:
Technoblade never dies!!!


# INFORMATION

This mod is created for people that want to bring Technoblade into their game! Technoblade is a passive entity. Unless you attack him, he's passive. Technoblade is unkillable as well (besides from /kill), meaning when he's low on health, he will play the sound for Technoblade never dies and fully heal himself.

## WHAT IS ADDED?

Who's asking this question?? It adds the Technoblade entity, Ice water to tame Techno, and the Technoblade crown as a wearable item.

## HOW DOES THIS WORK?

Simple.. You just chill with a Technoblade entity...
